scope: Generated and displayed data surfaces in index.html

coverageStatuses.verified: Reference JSON carries page citations and the inline constant is tested as a current mirror of that reference.
coverageStatuses.attested: Reference JSON attests inclusion policy and source pages, but the inline constant may be filtered or normalized for play.
coverageStatuses.partial: Reference JSON/page citations exist, but the app combines sources or generated helper rows that are not a one-to-one mirror yet.
coverageStatuses.unverified: Committed reference JSON explicitly marks the source extraction as not verified.
coverageStatuses.blocked: The UI must disclose that a current reference has gaps before treating the displayed data as fully proven.

entries.label: Skill definitions and base formulae
entries.summary: Core standard/professional skill formulae are cited, while passion templates and Glorantha-specific aliases still need a consolidated provenance crosswalk.
blockers: Add a source-backed crosswalk for generated passion rows and Glorantha alias skills before marking SKILLS_DATA fully verified.

entries.label: Weapons, prices, equipment, and starting kit
entries.summary: Weapon inclusion is filtered to Gloranthan-attested sources; starting equipment and money are derived from Mythras Core plus AiG culture notes.

references.citation: Mythras Core p.62-67 and Gloranthan setting rows

blockers: Non-Waha cult rows and culture/cult memberships still need per-cult one-pager and AiG page/block evidence before this coverage can be verified.

entries.label: Rune affinity display data
entries.summary: Rune meanings and glyphs are sourced, but the UI combines AiG affinity rules with RuneQuest Starter Set descriptions.

references.source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha

blockers: Document the exact field-level merge between AiG affinity rules and RuneQuest Starter Set rune descriptions.

entries.label: Cultures, homelands, and combat styles
entries.summary: AiG culture data is linked to CSE combat style IDs; app-facing CSE combat-style rows now have bounded PDF-text row extraction and independent rendered-page OCR title verification artifacts.

references.citation: style page refs in each row
style page refs in each row

entries.label: Social class and starting money tables
entries.summary: Mythras Core social class rows are cited; culture type mapping is reconciled with AiG cultures and still deserves a dedicated field-level proof table.
blockers: Field-level attestation for CULTURE_TYPE_MAPPING remains separate from the raw social-class tables.

entries.label: Career lists and career skills
entries.summary: Career skill lists are sourced from Mythras Core; culture availability uses AiG career-category notes.
blockers: Culture-specific career filtering needs explicit tests against AiG careers_by_culture before this can be full verified coverage.

entries.label: Cult records and culture-to-cult map
entries.summary: Waha cult facts and the Praxian Waha mapping are backed by the current bounded vision-verified one-pager. Non-Waha cult rows and culture/cult memberships are retained as explicit legacy mapping exemptions pending per-cult and AiG page/block evidence.

references.source: Derived from CultOnePagers2019 areas + AiG culture descriptions
Notes from Pavis Cult One-Pagers (2019 v5.2)

blockers: Non-Waha cult rows and culture/cult memberships still need per-cult one-pager and AiG page/block evidence before this coverage can be verified.

entries.label: Special effects and combat traits
entries.summary: Core special effects and Glorantha-relevant combat traits have attestation/reference JSON.

references.citation: Mythras Core p.135-137 and AiG combat styles

entries.label: Folk Magic spell names and descriptions
entries.summary: General picker membership is reconciled against Mythras Core, AiG, and cult one-pagers; AiG-specific descriptions come from the verified AiG extraction.

references.citation: Mythras Core p.122-130, AiG culture lists, cult folk magic

entries.label: Theist miracle lists and rune access
entries.summary: Waha miracle names and rank/associate sections are backed by bounded vision extraction and independent verification; Waha rune arrays are app-derived from verified cult runes/common miracle rules. Non-Waha miracle rows are retained as explicit legacy normalized exemptions.

references.source: Notes from Pavis Cult One-Pagers with Waha 2026 one-pager override
references.citation: source_disposition plus per-cult miracle lists; Waha p.1 bounded evidence

blockers: Non-Waha miracle rows need per-cult bounded extraction and independent verification before MIRACLES_DATA can be promoted from partial to verified.
Waha per-miracle rune arrays remain derived app data until a source explicitly lists per-miracle rune requirements.

entries.label: Sorcery spells and sorcery resource rules
entries.summary: Sorcery spell names/descriptions and chargen rules are backed by the verified Mythras Core sorcery extraction.

entries.label: Starting spirit options and animist guidance
entries.summary: Concrete example spirits cite verified Bird in the Hand examples, and Mythras Core animism/base spirit pages now have bounded page evidence; AiG spirit magic and STARTING_SPIRITS regeneration remain open.
blockers: STARTING_SPIRITS has not yet been regenerated from the verified Core/Bird/Monster evidence set.

entries.label: Culture magic-fit guidance
entries.summary: Culture magic guidance mirrors the AiG culture magic profile JSON and carries citations on each profile.
